topic: Leaky gut syndrome — how endotoxins enter your bloodstream
caption: Did you know your gut is leaking toxins into your blood? 🌟 Learn how to heal your gut and stop the leak. Here are the facts: 📚 70% of your immune system is in your gut. 💡 Endotoxins from bad bacteria can enter your bloodstream. 🌿 Fiber and omega-3s can help heal your gut. Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. #leakygutsyndrome #guthealth #endotoxins #immunesystem #healyourgut
